faqs.question: What methods do you use for cockroach extermination?
faqs.answer: We use a combination of gel baits, insect growth regulators, targeted sprays, and dust treatments applied to cracks, crevices, and void spaces. All products are EPA-approved and safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.

faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a service guarantee for all cockroach treatments. If cockroaches return within the guarantee period, we will re-treat your property at no additional cost. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to prevent future infestations.
